title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
company: State Bank of India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
